raw.objective: “to determine the population clearance values of phenobarbitone in these children of Chinese origin”
raw.covariates: Tested: Age, WT, SEX, comedication of CBZ or PHT on CL Included: WT, comedication on CL
raw.observations: One term is used for either/both CBZ and PHT influence on PHB CL. No goodness of fit was given.
raw.equations: M=0 if(CBZ==1 | PHT==1) M=theta3 CL/F=((theta1**M)*exp(theta2+theta3*WT)*WT/24)*exp(eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) Theta1 converted from L/kg/day as reported in the article to L/h

extraction_target.title: Determination of phenobarbitone population clearance values for physically and mentally handicapped Chinese children with epilepsy.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: M=0 if(CBZ==1 | PHT==1) M=theta3 CL/F=((theta1**M)*exp(theta2+theta3*WT)*WT/24)*exp(eta1) Css=D/(CL*Tau) Cobs=Css*(1+eps1) Theta1 converted from L/kg/day as reported in the article to L/h
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to determine the population clearance values of phenobarbitone in these children of Chinese origin”

tested: comedication of CBZ or PHT on CL
covariates.raw: Tested: Age, WT, SEX, comedication of CBZ or PHT on CL Included: WT, comedication on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
